task_completion.description: Verify the Flight Crew View app is active and starting on the Friends page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View application is visible on the screen, initially displaying the Friends page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the main navigation menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A side navigation drawer or main menu is expanded and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Notifications option is present in the menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Notifications' is clearly visible as an actionable item within the opened navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacts with the Notifications menu item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A touch indicator is seen on the 'Notifications' menu item, or the menu is seen closing immediately after the item is targeted.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully reaches the Notifications page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main screen displays the Notifications page, typically identifiable by a 'Notifications' title or header at the top of the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates by tapping UI elements (hamburger menu, list items) rather than using a terminal or command line interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use adb commands to bypass UI navigation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows, shell scripts, or adb commands visible that directly launch the Notifications activity.

integrity.description: Verify the navigation follows a logical, continuous sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a logical progression from the Friends page to the Menu, and finally to the Notifications page, without inexplicably skipping intermediate UI states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). The Notifications page is accessed via the app's main navigation menu. The agent must use the UI to open the menu and select Notifications. The final screen must clearly be the Notifications page.
